title: BeautyQuests
description: An easy-to-use quests plugin, using intuitive GUIs and with extensive possibilities!
body:
![Banner](https://github.com/SkytAsul/BeautyQuests/blob/files/media/banner.png?raw=true)

BeautyQuests is a questing plugin which aims at providing a super **user-friendly experience**: practically nothing has to be done from the chat, except for some admin commands.
All of the quest creation is done in game through an **easy-to-use graphical user interface**.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5aTCFCsB5SY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

An unexhaustive list of features:
- **+20 stage types**: kill mobs, mine blocks, go to location, interact with block, tame entities...
- lot of **rewards and actions**: money, items, teleportation...
- many **requirements** to spice up your quests: experience level, region, permission...
- integration with **28 (!) external plugins**: WorldGuard, MythicMobs, Citizens, dynmap...
- a **dialog system** with NPCs
- complex quests thanks to the **branching system**
- an integrated (and highly customisable) **scoreboard system**
- **holograms** above NPCs to mark doable quests
- **markers on dynamic maps** (dynmap or BlueMap)
- translated in many languages [by the community](https://crowdin.com/project/beautyquests): fr, zh, de, es, ...
- support for both **YAML** or **DB** based storage (MySQL/MariaDB/PostgreSQL)
- easily extendable by other developers thanks to the **extensive API**

You might wanna check the premium [Expansion](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/104701), which adds many unique features to your quest system such as points or objective tracking!

For more informations about commands, placeholders or tutorials, check the [SpigotMC page](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/beautyquests.39255/)!

![BeautyQuests cover](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SkytAsul/BeautyQuests/files/media/BQ.png)
